zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Birkin於1209年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉可頓時，她的父親John de Birkin45歲，母親Joan de Lenveise45歲。她與Robert de Everingham I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1252年6月14日在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Birkin于1209年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉可頓时，她的父亲John de Birkin45岁，母亲Joan de Lenveise45岁。她与Robert de Everingham I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1252年6月14日在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Birkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Birkin (WR Yorks). The name had presumably migrated to S England by the 16th century.

variants.name: Burkin
meanings: English: variant of Birkin, a habitational name from the parish of Birkin in Yorkshire, so named with Old English bircen ‘birch grove’, a derivative of birce ‘birch’ (see Birch ), influenced by Old Scandinavian birki. The surname Birkin had presumably migrated to southern England by the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Birkin was born in 1209, in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Birkin, was 45 and her mother, Joan de Lenveise, was 45. She married Robert de Everingham I. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 14 June 1252, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Birkin est née en 1209, à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Birkin, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan de Lenveise, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d’Everingham I. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 juin 1252, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Birkin 1209 in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Birkin 45 und ihre Mutter Joan de Lenveise 45. Sie hat Robert de Everingham I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Juni 1252 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Birkin è nata il nel 1209 nel Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Birkin, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Joan de Lenveise, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Everingham I. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 giugno 1252, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Birkinが1209年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンで生まれた時，父John de Birkinは45歳，母Joan de Lenveiseは45歳であった。Robert de Everingham Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1252年6月14日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Birkin(이)가 1209년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Birkin(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Lenveise(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Everingham I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 6월 14일 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Birkin nasceu em 1209, em Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Birkin, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Lenveise, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Everingham I. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de junho de 1252, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Birkin родилась в 1209 г. в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Birkin было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Lenveise, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Everingham I. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 14 июня 1252 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel De Birkin nació en 1209, en Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Birkin, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joan de Lenveise, tenía 45 años.
